ab: Piyu’, nel cu ṟumungi’ maras ci papatas la, pakacikiy cu hang?
ch: W:Piyu，我忘了帶筆，你可以借我嗎?
en: Piyu’, I forgot to bring my pen. Can you lend me one?

ab: ungat ka kinang uṟi’, Yuman ka hani.
en: I don’t have one either. This is yuma’s.

ab: kacikiy ta tikiy hang? sibi’ misu micuw.
ch: W:那可以借我一下子嗎?我很快就還你。
en: Can you lend me the pen for a second? I will return to you immediately.

ab: ho’, gali’ ga.
en: Sure, take it.

ab: bahbah su, kaṟali’ tikiy ka Yuma uṟi kay.
en: Thank you and thank Yuma for me.

ab: amol ka gagalun su na?
en: May I help you?

ab: nel cu moh sumatu ci sa’ing patas hani.
en: I want to return these two books.

ab: ho’ga, amol ka gagalun su nan?
en: No problem and what else do you need?

ab: pakacit cu ci tugal patas hani na.
en: I would like to borrow these three books.

ab: ho’ ga, iya’ ṟungi’ wahi’ matu’ maktugal kay.
ch: A:好了，記得三天後要拿來還。
en: Sure and remember to return them after three days.

ab: ini’ suku’ pabinahi ka papuṟut mu na.
en: You haven’t returned me the eraser.

ab: wal misu pabinahun hira’ la.
en: I returned it yesterday.

ab: hunco’ mu ini taxi’ ka papuṟut mu la?
ch: M:那我的橡皮擦怎麼不見了？
en: Then, why is my eraser missing?

ab: ye su wal pakacikan Pawan la?
en: Did you lend it to Pawan?

ab: ini’ mu ba’i’, hali’ mu ma’ut ka hiya.
en: I don’t know. I will go and ask her.

ab: pakaciki’ misu ka papuṟut mu hang.
en: I will lend you my eraser first.

ab: Yuma, pinkacikan sinang ni Pawan ka lukus pababawen hani?
en: Yuma, did Pawan lend you this coat?

ab: aṟat wa, bininiy kinang ni yaya mu ka hani.
ch: W:不是，這是我媽媽買給我的。
en: No, my mom bought it for me.

ab: mintana sinang ka lukus pababawen ni Temu.
en: Temu’s coat is the same as yours.

ab: makalux ka pababawen ni hiya ini pintana’ ka iro’ min.
ch: W:他的外套是黑色的，我們的顏色不一樣。
en: His coat is black, so our colors are different.

ab: Temi, kunacik su ci pila’ ni Piyu?
en: Temi, did you borrow money from Piyu?

ab: ho, halan mu matu’ lake’ kira’ hiyan, ga, ṟumungi’ cu maras ci pila’ la.
ch: W:有，我本來今天要還他，我忘記帶錢了。
en: Yes, I was supposed to return to him today, but I forgot to bring the money.

ab: kanon babe’en suku la?
en: Then, when will you return the money?

ab: han mu matu’ cuxan la.
en: I will return to him tomorrow.

ab: ho’ ga, han mu kumaṟal ka Piyun.
en: Okay, I will tell Piyu for you.
